nasb.text: The height of the one pillar was eighteen cubits, and a bronze capital was on it; the height of the capital was three cubits, with a network and pomegranates on the capital all around, all of bronze. And the second pillar was like these with network.

esv.text: The height of the one pillar was eighteen cubits, and on it was a capital of bronze. The height of the capital was three cubits. A latticework and pomegranates, all of bronze, were all around the capital. And the second pillar had the same, with the latticework.

cnv.text: 銅柱每根高八公尺，柱上有銅柱頭；柱頭高一公尺三公寸，柱頭四周有網子和石榴都是銅的；另一根柱子同樣也有網子。

ccb.text: 铜柱高八米，柱顶有柱冠，高一点三五米。柱冠周围装饰着铜网和铜石榴。两根柱子都一样。
